enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1.1 These Directions shall be called the Master Direction on Incentives and penal
provisions for bank branches and CCs in respect of currency operations.
enriched_requirements.object: Direction on Incentives and penal provisions for bank branches and CCs in respect of currency operations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1.2 These directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the
official website of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The actual nature of
expenditure shall be ascertained by the concerned Issue Office (IO) of RBI at the time
of reimbursement of cost to the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned Issue Office (IO) of RBI at the time of reimbursement of cost to the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.6 Soiled Note
A 'soiled note' means a note which has become dirty due to normal wear and tear and
also includes a two-piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented
belong to the same note and form the entire note with no essential feature missing.
enriched_requirements.object: become dirty due to normal wear and tear and also includes a two-piece note pasted together wherein both the pieces presented belong

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.7 Mutilated Note
A 'mutilated note' means a note of which a portion is missing or which is composed of
more than two pieces.
enriched_requirements.object: a portion is missing or which is composed of more than two pieces

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.8 Imperfect Note
An 'imperfect note' means any note, which is wholly or partially, obliterated, shrunk,
washed, altered or indecipherable but does not include a mutilated note.
enriched_requirements.object: wholly or partially, obliterated, shrunk, washed, altered or indecipherable but does not include a mutilated note

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An additional incentive of ₹10/- per bag shall be
paid for coin distribution in rural and semi-urban
areas on the submission of a Concurrent Auditor
(CA) certificate to this effect.
enriched_requirements.object: distribution in rural and semi-urban areas on the submission of a Concurrent Auditor (CA) certificate to this effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2.1 The incentives in respect of bank notes shall be paid on the basis of:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
2.2 The incentive for distribution of coins shall be paid on the basis of net withdrawal
from the CC.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of net withdrawal from the CC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2.3 The CC holding banks shall raise invoice to RBI for claiming incentives.
enriched_requirements.object: for claiming incentives

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2.4 The CC branch shall pass on the incentive to the linked branches for the soiled
enriched_requirements.object: to the linked branches for the soiled

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
2.5 The distribution of coins shall be verified by RBI Regional Offices through
inspection of CCs/ incognito visit to branches, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: Regional Offices through inspection of CCs/ incognito visit to branches, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks / White Label ATM Operators (WLAOs) shall strengthen
their systems/ mechanisms to monitor availability of cash in ATMs and ensure timely
replenishment to avoid cash-outs.
enriched_requirements.object: to monitor availability of cash in ATMs and ensure timely replenishment to avoid cash-outs

Penalty shall be levied immediately.

Chapter IV - Penal Provisions for Reporting of Transactions/ Balances at CCs
To ensure smooth operations of the CCs and timely and accurate reporting of CC
transactions following guidelines shall be applicable.

1.1 Minimum Transaction Amount
The minimum amount of deposit into / withdrawal from CC shall be ₹50,000/-and
thereafter, in multiples of ₹10,000/-.
enriched_requirements.object: multiples of ₹10,000/-

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1.2 Reporting Timelines
The CCs shall invariably report all transactions through CyM-CC portal on the same
day by 7 pm.
enriched_requirements.object: through CyM-CC portal on the same day by 7 pm

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
on a local holiday), the CC shall report the transactions in CyM on the same day
by 7 PM.
enriched_requirements.object: CyM on the same day by 7 PM

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
on a global
holiday/ 2nd or 4th Saturdays of the month/ Sunday), the CC shall report
denomination-wise consolidated deposit and/ or withdrawal amount and
denomination-wise chest closing balance of the day by 7 pm to the concerned Issue
Office of RBI by e-mail and report day's transactions in CyM on the next working day.
enriched_requirements.object: and/ or withdrawal amount and denomination-wise chest closing balance of the day by 7 pm to the concerne

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On completion of the transactions
the user rights shall be restored to the original CC.
enriched_requirements.object: original CC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Proper record of such
authorisations shall be maintained for audit purposes.
enriched_requirements.object: purposes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Relaxation in the
reporting period on account of strike situation shall be considered on case-to-case
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Particular care shall be taken to ensure that
remittances of fresh / re-issuable notes sent to CCs from RBI / Note Printing Presses
are not reported as 'deposit' transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: that remittances of fresh / re-issuable notes sent to CCs from RBI / Note Printing Presses are not reported as 'deposit' transactio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Penal interest shall be levied in all cases
where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with Reserve Bank
on account of delayed / wrong reporting of transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with Reserve Bank on account of delayed / wrong reporting

conditions: If such amounts are included in the chest balances
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If such amounts are included in the chest balances,
these shall be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest.
enriched_requirements.object: of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In all the above cases (except shortages in chest balances / remittances, shortages
due to pilferage / frauds, counterfeit banknotes detected in chest balances /
remittances), penal interest shall be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible'
amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances as
mentioned below:
Sr.
enriched_requirements.object: date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances as mentioned bel

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Delayed / Wrong
In the event of delayed / wrong reporting CC
reporting of CC
transactions, penal interest at the rate of 2% over the
transaction
prevailing Bank Rate shall be levied on the amount due
from the CC for the period of delay / till the date of
receipt of corrected advice by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: amount due from the CC for the period of delay / till the date of receipt of corrected advice by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Penal
interest shall be calculated on T+0 basis (T being the
date of transaction).
enriched_requirements.object: basis (T being the date of transaction)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.1 Reporting of Soiled note remittances to RBI
Soiled note remittances sent to RBI shall not be shown as withdrawal by CCs and in
case of such reporting penalty shall be levied.
enriched_requirements.object: by CCs and in case of such reporting penalty shall be levied

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CC
sending the diversion should initiate the entry and the receiving CC should
acknowledge the same.
enriched_requirements.object: the receiving CC should acknowledge the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Diversions should not be reported as deposit / withdrawal and
in case of any such wrong reporting penalty shall be levied.

conditions:
where CCs had 'Net Deposit'
For delayed reporting of instances where CCs had reported 'net deposit'
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.3 Delayed reporting where CCs had 'Net Deposit'
For delayed reporting of instances where CCs had reported 'net deposit', penal interest
shall not be charged.

However, to ensure discipline in reporting of CC transaction, a
flat penalty shall be levied for such delayed reporting as under:
Sr.
enriched_requirements.object: delayed reporting as under: Sr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A flat penalty of ₹50,000/- shall
b.

Competent Authority
The Competent Authority to decide on the nature of irregularity and levy penal interest/
penalty thereof shall be the Officer-in-Charge of the Issue Department of the Regional
Office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting CC / bank branch / ATM is located.
enriched_requirements.object: the Issue Department of the Regional Office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting CC / bank branch / ATM is located

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Appellate Authority
Appeal against the decision of the Competent Authority may be made by the
Controlling Office of the CC / bank branch to the Regional Director / Chief General
Manage-r / Officer-in-Charge of the Regional Office concerned, within one month
from the date of debit / imposition of penalty, who shall decide whether the same
can be accepted (in full or part) / rejected.
enriched_requirements.object: can be accepted (in full or part) / rejected

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Appeals shall not be made in routine
manner.
enriched_requirements.object: manner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.1 Appeals for waiver of penalty made on grounds such as staff being new/ untrained,
lack of awareness, corrective action having been taken/ shall be taken, etc., shall not
be considered.

3.2 Given the business continuity capability provided by the CyM, there should
ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve
Bank's decision on penal interest / penalty imposed for delayed reporting of
transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision on penal interest / penalty imposed for delayed repo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, representations, if any, on account of genuine difficulties faced
by CCs especially in hilly/ remote areas and those affected by natural calamities, etc.,
may be made to the appellate authority.
enriched_requirements.object: appellate authority

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.3 Any penalty/ penal interest waiver request shall be considered, only if the
application for the same is made in the CyM-CC portal within the prescribed timelines.
enriched_requirements.object: the application for the same is made in the CyM-CC portal within the prescribed timelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Non-CC holding banks, not having credentials of CyM-CC portal may apply for waiver
request through email to the concerned Regional Office.
enriched_requirements.object: through email to the concerned Regional Office

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Waiver requests in any other
mode shall not be entertained.
3.4 In the case of wrong reporting, representation for waiver shall not be considered.

3.5 As the intention behind the levy of penal interest/ penalty is to inculcate discipline
among banks so as to ensure prompt/ correct reporting, requests by banks for waiver
of penal interest on grounds that delayed/ wrong reporting did not result in utilisation
of the Reserve Bank's funds or shortfall in the maintenance of CRR/ SLR or that they
were the result of clerical mistakes, unintentional or arithmetical errors, first time error,
inexperience of staff, expiry of digital certificate, etc., shall not be considered as valid
grounds for waiver of penal interest.
enriched_requirements.object: grounds for waiver of penal interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For each instance of such violation, a monetary penalty of ₹10,000/- shall be imposed.

A total of ₹99,300 shall be

conditions: In case of non-functioning of CCTV
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Non-compliance with operational guidelines by CCs detected by RBI officials
In case of non-functioning of CCTV, non-compliance with rules / guidelines pertaining
to CCTV recording, preservation period, and related issues, penalty of ₹5,000/- for
each instance of irregularity shall be levied.

Penalty shall be enhanced to ₹10,000/- in
case of repetition / recurrence of irregularity in consecutive inspection cycles or earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: in case of repetition / recurrence of irregularity in consecutive inspection cycles or earlier
